programmes.show_description: From the terrors of night driving to perfect family pranks, dicey weather for drivers and parking headaches - we've got it all Caught on Dashcam! (S5, ep 6)
From windy weather wipe-outs and the most villainous of drivers, to moments the police would rather you forget - we've got it all Caught on Dashcam! (S5, ep 7)
Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences. (S15, ep 4)
Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences. (S15, ep 5)
Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences. (S15, ep 6)
Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences. (S15, ep 7)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S8, ep 3)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S8, ep 4)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S8, ep 5)

Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
A trucker unleashes carnage on the motorway, an obnoxious drunk hassles police and a man who looks like a chimney sweep needs police help. (S16, ep 5)
A domestic ends in a car crash, but the fight keeps going. A belligerent drunk takes on the cops. (S16, ep 6)
A traveller's textbooks teach him an unexpected lesson, and a tourist hits a snag instead of the slopes. Plus, officers inspect a shipment of cosmetics. (S2, ep 4)
Officers add charges to a woman's lengthy rap sheet, before stumbling upon a hair-raising package from Malaysia. (S2, ep 5)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists.  (S4, ep 19)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists.  (S4, ep 20)

Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S5, ep 2)
Slowest Getaway: A driver on the run from police crashes a stop sign and risks a head-on collision with a bus. Can he escape both the police and a serious smash? (S10, ep 1)
Brand New Car: Officers Damien O'Brien and Steve Mottram stop a woman who likes to let her dog ride shotgun - even when her boyfriend is in the car. (S10, ep 2)
In Blaine, a traveller's plan to start an e-vape venture may go up in smoke and a couple returning from a Canadian casino could go bust. (S1, ep 23)
At JFK, officers discover cocaine concealed inside a Caribbean cocktail and a Chinese student hopes to get a pass from CBP after overstaying his visa. (S1, ep 24)
Staff at Auckland Airport meet a Greek man with no money but a rich history, while Customs find jeans with more than just dodgy labels to hide. (S11, ep 9)
Customs deal with a Lithuanian man who has very questionable holiday plans and a risky item lands at the International Mail Centre. (S11, ep 10)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists.  (S4, ep 8)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S4, ep 9)

Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists.  (S4, ep 11)
Rivals: Quark feels threatened when a charming swindler arrives on Deep Space Nine and opens a bar in direct competition with him.
The First Ones: Daniel Jackson is captured after an archaeological dig leads to the discovery of a primordial Goa'uld symbiote. (S4, ep 8)
Author, Author: Tensions simmer when the Doctor sends a holonovel for publication, detailing the life of a doctor onboard a lost starship who is treated like a slave. (S7, ep 20)
The Big Goodbye: When the holodecks malfunction, the Captain and three crew members become trapped in San Francisco, 1941, where they are held hostage by murderous gangsters.
Border Force investigate the claims of two people who claim to be on their honeymoon when their travel itinerary raises alarm bells. (S15, ep 11)
A man struggles to explain what his plans are for a three-month trip to Australia, and suspicion heightens when a drug dog takes an interest in his bag. (S15, ep 12)
Creating a Monster: The team is sent looking for a suspect who gunned down a federal judge in broad daylight. (S6, ep 4)
Caesar: Barnes goes on a risky undercover mission involving a power-hungry gang leader who is planning turf wars and massacres.
Terra Nova: The crew investigate Terra Nova, a mysterious human colony in outer space, but when they arrive they find the inhabitants have evolved far beyond human parameters.
Whiskey and Sticky and All the Rest Can Wait: Ah Sahm and Hong race to free Young Jun. With Mai Ling in prison, Li Yong plans a rescue mission. (S3, ep 5 of 10)
As the documentary returns for a fifth season, officers race to a stabbing outside a pub in Newcastle and there is a raid on a cannabis farm. (S5, ep 1)
Action-packed documentary following rapid response officers, the fastest cops in Britain, as they crack down on crime. Time is of the essence! (S3, ep 4)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S8, ep 1)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S8, ep 2)
Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders. (S10, ep 5)
Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders. (S10, ep 6)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S8, ep 9)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S8, ep 10)
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
A sniper attack on the motorway puts police on full alert, and a man tries to run from police on foot but nature interferes with his getaway. (S16, ep 7)
Cameras capture an unbelievable smash as a drunk pushes his speed to the limit and a man thinks it's a good idea to hitch a ride with police. (S16, ep 8)
Officers are stumped by a backpacker carrying photos of his criminal activities. Plus, an American band gets caught in a jam. (S2, ep 6)
Staff confront an American soldier running scared, and a British woman causes confusion with her bag of tricks. (S2, ep 7)

Follow Australia's traffic enforcers as they face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S10, ep 3)
Follow Australia's traffic enforcers as they face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S10, ep 4)
CBP questions a pair of real estate entrepreneurs bound for Florida. In Blaine, a Canadian traveller's US investments are cause for concern. (S1, ep 25)
At O'Hare International, a returning American's bananas cause a slip-up in secondary. A mother covers for her kid at Detroit's Ambassador Bridge. (S1, ep 26)
Biosecurity officer Jade makes an expensive witchcraft-related discovery. Also, some suspicious lampshades reach Customs. (S12, ep 1)
Immigration discovers an attempt to establish a dangerous and illegal business in New Zealand. Meanwhile, Customs uncovers a drugs scam. (S12, ep 2)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists.  (S4, ep 12)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists.  (S4, ep 13)

The Alternate: Odo's mentor arrives on Deep Space Nine intent on resuming his search for Odo's true origin.
Scorched Earth: SG-1 find themselves caught between two civilisations attempting to colonise the same planet. (S4, ep 9)
Friendship One: With communications to the Alpha Quadrant now established, Starfleet sends Voyager on a mission to retrieve a 21st-century probe called Friendship One. (S7, ep 21)
Datalore: Data's android lookalike formulates an evil masterplan that could destroy the Enterprise.
Officers stop a Vietnamese man wearing very unusual jewellery. Another man claims he has nothing to declare but an inspection proves he is lying... a lot! (S15, ep 13)
An alarming X-ray of a package at the mail centre leaves the Wildlife team rushing to get it open before it's too late. A young man is caught out by the drug detector dog. (S15, ep 14)
You Know Your Dragon Best: The crew attempt to control a dangerous forest fire and save a group of environmentalists protesting a new housing development. (S1, ep 13)
Unburdened: The Fly Team investigates when an American police detective on the federal task force is murdered in Paris. (S2, ep 1)
The Andorian Incident: Archer and his crew encounter hostile, paranoid aliens when they visit a Vulcan monastery and discover it has been taken over by the Andorians. (S1, ep 7)
